mappings.Transformation: call-template 'ERPDateTime' to get value by passing parameter Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/QuoteRequestReference/@requestDate

mappings.Source structure: Call-template "ReadQuote" to get doc_type from Cross reference file
mappings.Transformation: if test="($compcode = 0 and $vendor > 0 and $doctype = 0)", call-template "ReadQuote" to get docu_type from Cross reference file

mappings.Source structure: Call-template "ReadQuote" to get vendor from Cross reference file
mappings.Transformation: Call-template "ReadQuote" to get one time vendor from Cross reference file
map to Payload/cXML/Header/From/Credential[@domain = 'PrivateID']/Identity if exists else Map  map to Payload/cXML/Header/From/Credential[@domain = 'VendorID']/Identity

if Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/Extrinsic[@name = 'Terms']/Extrinsic[@name = 'ValidityStartDate']) > 0 then call-template "ERPDateTime" to get $v_date and map to substring($v_date, 1,10) otherwise, call call-template "ERPDateTime" for Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/@quoteDate and get $date then map to substring($v_date, 1,10)

if Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/Extrinsic[@name = 'Terms']/Extrinsic[@name = 'ValidityEndDate']) > 0 then call-template "ERPDateTime" to get $v_date and map to substring($v_date, 1,10) otherwise, map to 9999-12-31
call-template "ERPDateTIME by passing @quoteDate to get $v_date and map to it using substring($v_date, 1, 10)
for each Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn, process only if Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn/@parentLinenumber exists
if ItemID/BuyerPartID not blank and if it is lessthan 19 char length then map to it

<xsl:variable name="doctype"
        select="string-length(Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/QuoteHeaderInfo/FollowUpDocument/@category)"/>
    <xsl:variable name="compcode"
        select="string-length(Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader/QuoteHeaderInfo/LegalEntity/IdReference[@domain = 'CompanyCode']/@identifier)"/>
    <xsl:variable name="vendor"
        select="string-length(Combined/Payload/cXML/Header/From/Credential[@domain = 'PrivateID']/Identity)"/>

if $compcode & $vendor & $doctype are blank then call-template "ReadQuote" to get plant cross-reference value 
otherwise check length of ShipTo/Address/@addressID > 0 then map to it.
if ItemDetail/Extrinsic/Extrinsic[@name = 'PriceUnit'] > 0 then map to it
if @itemClassification = 'service' then map to 9 elseif @itemClassification = 'material' then map to 0
if ((ItemID/BuyerPartID = '') and (not(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo/@documentType = 'requisition')) and (string-length(@parentLineNumber) = 0)) then call-template "ReadQuote" to get the value
if TermsOfDelivery/TransportTerms/@value > 0 then map to it
if TermsOfDelivery/TransportTerms > 0 then map to it

if ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition'] and string-length(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition']/@documentID) > 0 then map to value-of select="format-number(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition']/@documentID, '0000000000')

if ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'quoteRequest'] and string-length(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'quoteRequest']/@documentID) > 0 then map to value-of select="format-number(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'quoteRequest']/@documentID, '0000000000')

for each Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn
and process only if ((ItemID/BuyerPartID = '') and (not(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo/@documentType = 'requisition')) and (string-length(@parentLineNumber) = 0))

get the account assignment category maintained in PD into variable $AccAssCat by calling template"ReadQuote" and then fill various fields based on  it.
If $AccAssCat = 'K', call template "ReadQuote" to get cost center value
If $AccAssCat = 'K', call template "ReadQuote" to get GL_ACCOUNT value
If $AccAssCat = 'A', call template "ReadQuote" to get ASSET_NO value
If $AccAssCat = 'A', call template "ReadQuote" to get SUB_NUMBER value
If $AccAssCat = 'F', call template "ReadQuote" to get ORDER_ID value
If $AccAssCat = 'F', call template "ReadQuote" to get GL_ACCOUNT value
If $AccAssCat = 'P', call template "ReadQuote" to get WBS_ELEMENT value
If $AccAssCat = 'P', call template "ReadQuote" to get GL_ACCOUNT value

for each Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn
and process only if((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) or ((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item')) and if (ItemDetail/UnitPrice/Money) not blank
if (not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) or if ((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') then call-template "ReadQuote" to get value from cross reference
if test="(not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and process for each ItemDetail/UnitPrice/Modifications/Modification

when test="exists(AdditionalDeduction/DeductionPercent[@percent]), then call-template "ReadQuote" to get value from PD(Cross reference)
when test="exists(AdditionalDeduction/DeductionAmount/Money) then call-template "ReadQuote" to get value from PD(Cross reference)
when test="exists(AdditionalCost/Percentage[@percent]) then call-template "ReadQuote" to get value from PD(Cross reference)
 when test="exists(AdditionalCost/Money) then call-template "ReadQuote" to get value from PD(Cross reference)

when test="exists(AdditionalDeduction/DeductionPercent[@percent])" then map to AdditionalDeduction/DeductionPercent/@percent
when test="exists(AdditionalDeduction/DeductionAmount/Money)" then map to "AdditionalDeduction/DeductionAmount/Money"
when test="exists(AdditionalCost/Percentage[@percent]) then map to "AdditionalCost/Percentage/@percent"
 when test="exists(AdditionalCost/Money) then map to "AdditionalCost/Money"

when test="exists(AdditionalDeduction/DeductionAmount/Money)" then map to "AdditionalDeduction/DeductionAmount/Money/@currency"
when test="exists(AdditionalCost/Money)" then map to "AdditionalCost/Money/@currency"

if ((exists(Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn/ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn/ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))" then go ahead to process
process for each Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn and if test="((not(exists(@parentLineNumber)) and (@itemClassification = 'service')))"
if not(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money = '' then map to it otherwise inform blank
when test="not(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money = '  ')" then map to it other wise map to blank
call-template "ERPDateTime" to get date into $v_date and map in the format, value-of select="translate(substring($v_date, 1, 10), '-', ''"

if test="ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition'] and string-length(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition']/@documentID) > 0 then map to value-of select="format-number(ReferenceDocumentInfo/DocumentInfo[@documentType = 'requisition']/@documentID, '0000000000')"

variable name="header"
        select="Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteMessageHeader"

if test="exists($header/Comments)" call-template "ExtractComments" by passing $header/Comments to get text
or if test="string-length($header/@quoteID) > 10 then call-template "ExtractComments" by passing $header/Comments to get text

variable name= "item" select="Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn"

for each $item, if test="exists(Comments)" then call-template "ExtractComments" to get text value

variable name= "item" select="Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn"
for each $item process 
decalre variable name="Counter" and set value of "12340"
when test="(not(exists(@parentLineNumber)) and (@itemType = 'composite'))" then map to '0' otherwise map to @LineNumber of Requisition

when test="(not(exists(@parentLineNumber)) and (@itemType = 'composite'))" then map to substring(ItemDetail/Description, 1, 8)
other wise map to substring(ItemDetail/Description/ShortName, 1, 8)

mappings.Source structure: <---- for itemClassification = service and if this is a child service item --->

mappings.Transformation: if ItemID/BuyerPartID is not blank then map to ItemID/BuyerPartID
if test="string-length(ItemDetail/UnitPrice/Money) > 0" then map in the format of "(format-number(ItemDetail/UnitPrice/Money, '0.00'))"
if test="ItemDetail/Classification[@domain = 'MaterialGroup']" then map to ItemDetail/Classification[@domain = 'MaterialGroup']/@code
process for each Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn and if test @lineNumber = Alternative/@basicLineNumber then  map to $Counter + position()

variable name= "item" select="Combined/Payload/cXML/Message/QuoteMessage/QuoteItemIn"
for each $item process 
decalre variable name="Counter" and set value of "12340"
process only when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))"

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))"  OR
test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))), then map to @lineNumber
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))" then map to @parentLineNumber + 1

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))" then map to '0'
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))"> then map to value-of select="$Counter + position()"

test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))), then map to '0'

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))" then map to '00'
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))" then map to '01'
test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))) then map to '01'

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))" then map to '00'
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))" then map to '01'

test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))) then map to '01'

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))" OR
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))" then map to @quantity

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))) then map to '1'

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and (not(exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) or exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money))))" OR
when test="(((exists(@parentLineNumber)) and @itemType = 'item') and (not(@serviceLineType = 'Information')))" and if test="string-length(ItemDetail/UnitPrice/Money) > 0" then map to it

when test="(((not(exists(@parentLineNumber))) and (@itemClassification = 'service')) and ((exists(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money)) or (exists(ItemDetail/OverallLimit/Money)))) and if test="string-length(ItemDetail/ExpectedLimit/Money) > 0 then map to it
